prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the EA888 Gen4 (DSG-only, 350 HP/406 Nm) with APR Carbonio intake, APR Catted Downpipe (2.5" diameter, 300-cell catalytic converter), and APR Intercooler Upgrade (front-mount, 1000g core, 60% larger than OEM)

Garrett GT2867R turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing, 62mm compressor wheel) paired with Integrated Engineering (IE) 91-octane fueling kit (high-flow fuel pump, 1000cc injectors, and IE Flex Fuel Sensor) for the EA888 Gen4 (CZPA/CZDA) engine

034 Motorsport Motorsport Engine Mounts (75A durometer, billet aluminum inserts) + 034 Motorsport Transmission Mount Insert (polyurethane, 80A durometer) + Neuspeed Rear Subframe Bushings (80A durometer) to eliminate drivetrain slop under 350+ HP loads
estetica: Rieger Tuning GT8 widebody conversion kit (carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser) with OEM+ paint-matched finish (VW Pure White, LK9A) and 3M Matte Black vinyl roof wrap

H&R Street Performance Coilovers (25mm drop, adjustable damping) with Eibach Pro-Spacer 15mm wheel spacers (5x112 hubcentric) and Neuspeed RSE10 19x9.5 ET38 wheels (Gunmetal finish, 235/35/19 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires)

VWR Carbon Fiber Rear Wing (3-piece, adjustable angle) + VWR Carbon Fiber Mirror Caps + VWR Carbon Fiber Front Grille Insert (honeycomb mesh) with LED DRL delete and full de-chrome (blackout badges, emblems, and trim)
